Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes: tagine of chicken with preserved lemons and olives and prosciutto- chicken roulade served with chard
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril shares the virtues of southern caviar, proving it can be both accessible and sustainable: Emeril's Grilled Shrimp with Caviar Butter.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost to time until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Image.alt: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Emeril and Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.
Video.title: with Mushroom Maggie's

Video.summary: Emeril kicks-up an old favorite, the casserole: Lamb and White Bean Casserole; Cowboy Chicken Casserole; Emeril's Favorite Choucroute Casserole; Risotto and Wild Mushroom Casserole
Video.title: Casseroles for Every Occasion

Video.summary: Crawfish Egg Rolls with Hot Sesame Drizzle, Crawfish Imperial, Crawfish Burgers, Fried Crawfish Tails with Olive Salad
Video.title: Crawfish Season

Video.summary: Celebrate Cleveland's roots with a Polish-inspired tailgate menu.
Video.title: Cleveland Browns

Video.summary: Fish and Vinegar Chips, Fish and Chips with Tartar Sauce
Video.title: Fish and Chips

Video.summary: Corn Crab Bisque, Roasted Pepper Cream Soup
Video.title: Cream Soups

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how easy it is to make fresh pasta at home.
Video.title: Homemade Pasta

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp? Emeril presents two delicious recipes.
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Nothing says Washington, D.C., like Emeril's crispy chicken wings with mumbo sauce.
Video.title: Washington Commanders

Video.summary: For a Tampa Bay style tailgate, treat your guests to Emeril's grilled fish with coconut rice.
Video.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Asian-American communities who value Morning Glory, a highly invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: So for the next tailgate, celebrate it Vegas style; truffle parmesan potato chips; cowboy steak with maitre d'butter; potato fennel gratin; pecan pie with caramel sauce.
Video.title: Las Vegas Raiders

Video.summary: Texas Style BBQ Ribs, Nola Ribs, BBQ Shrimp with Jalapeno Biscuits
Video.title: BBQ

Video.summary: Leg of Lamb Stuffed with Goat Cheese and Spinach Stuffing, Lamb Kabobs
Video.title: Lamb

Video.summary: Fish with Potato Crust and Roasted Red Pepper Sauce, Andouille Crusted Scallops with Creole Mustard
Video.title: Crusting

Video.summary: Chicken with Black Bean Chili, Guacamole, Salsa, Fried Tortilla Chips
Video.title: Southwest Chicken

Video.summary: Duck Roulade, Simple Roulade Sauces
Video.title: Roulades

Video.summary: Bernard's Southern Cooked Greens, Corn Bread, Dirty Rice, Southern Fried Chicken
Video.title: Down Home

Video.summary: Sweet Pie Dough, Old Fashioned Crisp, Wrapped Cobblers
Video.title: Cooking with Crust

Video.summary: Oysters Rockefeller, Oyster Soup
Video.title: Oysters

Video.summary: E.J. and Meril join dad Emeril to make some of their favorite recipes.
Video.title: Cooking with Your Kids

Video.summary: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Emeril's Corn Tortillas, Tortilla Soup, Roasted Pork Enchiladas, Roasted Pork Chimichangas, Corn and Goat Cheese Quesadillas, Banana Quesadillas
Video.title: Tortillas

Video.summary: Farmer's Market Salad with Goat Cheese Croutons, Baked Sea Trout with Market Vegetables and Potatoes, Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie with Almond Crumb Topping
Video.title: Emeril's Farmers Market

Video.summary: Seared Beef Carpaccio with Shaved Artichokes and Truffle Oil, Salt-and-Herb-Crusted Red Snapper with Orange Salsa, Angel Food Cake with Papaya Sorbet Parfait
Video.title: The Lighter Side

Video.summary: Classic Lyonnaise Potatoes, Onion Tarts, Veal Liver and Onions
Video.title: Food and Wine Pairing (Lyon, France)
